query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN moves IS NULL OR moves = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_moves, SUM(CASE WHEN fen IS NULL OR fen = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_fen FROM puzzles;
